name: CLMD
description:
CLMD is coming to Vulkan Arena on May 2, 2026!

CLMD, also known as Martin Danielle, is a renowned DJ, music producer, songwriter and TV personality, whose extraordinary talent and undeniable passion for music have propelled him to the forefront of the international music scene. With his exceptional skill set, remarkable achievements, and unmatched versatility, CLMD stands as an exceptional artist and sought-after performer.

Ever since Martin Danielle started CLMD in 2010, the project has grown with every release. The 2016 single “Dust” featuring Astrid S, included on his 2018 album “Phases,” became his biggest release to date, followed in autumn 2018 by the hit single “Trouble” and most recently the chart-topping track “DANCE.” With over 20 million streams in a short time, it proves that CLMD is unstoppable!

Over the years, CLMD has built an impressive catalogue of collaborations and fans. He has remixed songs for stars such as Bruno Mars, Estelle, Nervo, Arty, and Norman Doray, received praise from Axwell / Ingrosso, Tiësto, and David Guetta, and toured the U.S. with Steve Angello.

With his extraordinary talent, remarkable achievements, and magnetic presence, he is a guaranteed crowd pleaser, ready to ignite the dance floors of the world. Get ready to embark on a sonic journey like no other with CLMD.
